language.description: Digest language. zh translates English source content into natural Chinese.

onboardingComplete.description: Set true once first-run onboarding has been completed. When false/absent the skill runs onboarding before anything else.

delivery.description: Optional. How the finished digest is delivered. Default is stdout (no auto-publish). All secrets come from environment variables only (sourced from ~/.follow-amazon-daily.env by the cron), never from config or chat: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, RESEND_API_KEY, FEISHU_WEBHOOK, FEISHU_WEBHOOK_SECRET (optional).

chatId.description: Telegram chat id (only when method is telegram). Bot token comes from env TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.

email.description: Recipient email (only when method is email). API key comes from env RESEND_API_KEY.

deliveryTime.description: Local HH:MM the scheduled run should fire (used when setting up the crontab).

weeklyDay.description: Day of week for weekly digests (only used when frequency is weekly).

sources.description: Source list. Each source supports: id, name, type (rss | youtube_rss | wearesellers | beehiiv_archive | generic_html | linklist), url, category, sourceType, sourceReliability, access, tags. Optional: lookbackHours (drop items older than this; undated official pages are exempt), linkPattern (regex for type=linklist anchor harvesting), altUrl (fallback URL), authEnv, rssUrl, handleUrl.

lookbackHours.description: Items published before now - lookbackHours are filtered out. Undated pages bypass this and rely on cross-run state dedup instead.

linkPattern.description: Regex (string form) used by type=linklist sources to harvest article anchors from an index/hub page.
